skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
WITH LatestSession AS (
    SELECT session_key, season, event_name
    FROM f1_data_library_DS.telemetry
    WHERE session_type = 'Q'
    ORDER BY date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    dn.full_name,
    dn.driver_code,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(t.lap_time_sec / 60) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(CAST(t.lap_time_sec AS NUMERIC), 60)) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(CAST(t.lap_time_sec * 1000 AS INT64), 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS formatted_lap_time,
    t.event_name,
    t.season
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.telemetry AS t
JOIN
    LatestSession AS ls
ON
    t.session_key = ls.session_key
    AND t.season = ls.season
    AND t.event_name = ls.event_name
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS dn
ON
    t.driver_number = CAST(dn.driver_number AS STRING) AND t.season = dn.season
WHERE
    t.session_type = 'Q'
ORDER BY
    t.lap_time_sec ASC
LIMIT 1
